project_context.project_goal: Stand up a cross-functional biotech workflow that covers feedstock, strain engineering, fermentation, recovery, and techno-economics.
project_context.raw_material_focus: Low-cost sugar streams and agricultural side-streams
project_context.notes: Keep the interface decision-oriented so teams can compare cost, biology, and process tradeoffs without losing the full workflow context.
project_context.focus_area: Raw Material Sourcing and Cost Analysis
starter_questions: What are the cost-effective sugar streams available?
How can we integrate agricultural side-streams into our process?
